headline: CELEBRITY CRUISES IS REDEFINING RIVER TRAVEL WITH THE INDUSTRY'S MOST EXTENSIVE AND EXPERIENTIAL DESTINATION EXPERIENCES
summary: Celebrity River Cruises unveiled a new standard for river travel today with an extensive destination discovery program that features four unique experience categories, each designed for guests to take home stories no one else can provide. Local insiders lead the Storyteller Series and Skillmaster Series, while the Keys to the City Series gives guests the tech-driven power to explore on their own with insights curated to their unique interests and passions. headline: Carnival Drops 22% This Month As Unhedged Fuel Strategy Backfires
summary: CCL is up 3% as oil pulls back, but still down 22% this month. Carnival doesn't hedge fuel purchases, unlike RCL and NCLH. Oil spike may cut earnings by $0.20. Traders predict low chance of oil falling to $80 or normal shipping in Strait of Hormuz by April 30. Recession chances up to 34%. Carnival to report Q1 earnings on March 20, but unlikely to change fuel strategy. If oil drops, will Carnival lock in cheaper fuel or make same bet again?

headline: Oil Shock, Private Credit Cracks & Adobe's Bittersweet Beat
summary: Brent crude punched through $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022, Iran's new Supreme Leader vowed to keep the Strait of Hormuz closed, and a simmering private credit crisis finally boiled over onto bank stock prices — all in a single Thursday session. Welcome to the new normal.
